title: Perform a Bag Out by Sorter Leg
summary: Use the bag out control to apply bag out to a selected sorter leg instead of the full system. The source confirms that bag out can be chosen by leg of the sorter, but does not provide exact interface labels or detailed completion validation steps.
when_to_use: Use when bag out needs to be applied to a selected sorter leg and the bag out control supports leg-based selection.
not_for: Do not use as a documented procedure for full-system bag out; this source distinguishes bag out by sorter leg from overall system bag out.
Do not use when exact interface labels, confirmation states, or completion criteria are required; the source does not provide those details.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the bag out control and select bag out by sorter leg when that option is available.

safety_notes: The source does not provide specific safety hazards, lockout/tagout requirements, or production stop requirements for this action.
Do not assume additional controls, confirmations, or cancellation behavior beyond what is stated in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the bag out control system
Ability to identify sorter legs in the control interface

access_required: Access to the bag out control system
system_preconditions: The bag out control must present an option to choose bag out by leg of the sorter.

visual_references.description: Training video frame describing overall system bag out control behavior and stating that a user can choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.

steps.title: Access the bag out control system
steps.purpose: Open the control area where bag out options are available.
steps.instruction: Access the bag out control system and navigate to the bag out control options.
steps.expected_result: The bag out control options are visible to the user.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface shows bag out control access or a bag out control popup/page.
steps.failure_condition: The bag out control cannot be accessed or bag out options are not visible.

actions.label: Open bag out control
actions.exact_action: Access the bag out control system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Bag out control slide/frame showing bag out control behavior and related options.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the bag out control system cannot be accessed.

steps.title: Identify the bag out by leg option
steps.purpose: Confirm that the control supports bag out at the sorter-leg level.
steps.instruction: Identify the option indicating that bag out can be performed by leg of the sorter.
steps.expected_result: A leg-based bag out option is present in the control.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface indicates that a user can choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.
steps.failure_condition: No leg-based bag out option is visible when this option is expected.

actions.label: Find leg-based bag out option
actions.exact_action: Identify the option to choose bag out by leg of the sorter.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Text or control area indicating that a user can choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the control does not allow leg selection when this option is expected from the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: A user could also choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.

steps.title: Select the desired sorter leg
steps.purpose: Scope the bag out action to the intended sorter leg.
steps.instruction: Select the desired sorter leg for the bag out action.
steps.expected_result: The intended sorter leg is selected for bag out.
steps.healthy_condition: The control reflects that a specific sorter leg has been chosen.
steps.failure_condition: The desired sorter leg cannot be identified or selected.

actions.label: Choose sorter leg
actions.exact_action: Select the desired sorter leg for the bag out action.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Bag out control context associated with leg-based bag out selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the desired sorter leg cannot be selected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: A user could also choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.

steps.title: Start bag out for the selected leg
steps.purpose: Initiate the bag out action for the selected sorter leg.
steps.instruction: Start the bag out for the selected sorter leg using the bag out control.
steps.expected_result: Bag out begins for the selected sorter leg.
steps.healthy_condition: The system accepts the action and begins bag out behavior for the selected leg.
steps.failure_condition: The bag out action does not start for the selected leg.

actions.label: Start leg bag out
actions.exact_action: Start the bag out for the selected leg.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Bag out control context where the selected leg bag out would be initiated.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the selected leg bag out does not start.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: A user could also choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.

steps.title: Observe bag out behavior for the selected leg
steps.purpose: Monitor whether the system shows bag out activity associated with the selected leg.
steps.instruction: Observe the bag out behavior for the selected leg using the system's displayed exchange activity or status if available.
steps.expected_result: The system shows bag out activity associated with the selected sorter leg rather than only a full-system action.
steps.healthy_condition: Displayed exchange activity or status indicates the selected leg is the scope of the bag out action, if such status is available.
steps.failure_condition: No observable leg-specific bag out behavior is available, or the source-supported interface does not provide enough detail to confirm completion.

actions.label: Monitor leg bag out status
actions.exact_action: Observe the bag out behavior for the selected leg using the system's displayed exchange activity or status if available.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Any displayed bag out or exchange-related status associated with bag out control behavior.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the control does not show leg-specific behavior when leg-based bag out was selected.
Escalate if confirmation of completion is required; the source does not provide detailed validation steps for confirming completion by leg.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: A user could also choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.

success_criteria: The bag out control supports selection by sorter leg.
The intended sorter leg is selected.
Bag out is initiated for the selected leg rather than only as a full-system action.
healthy_conditions: A leg-based bag out option is visible.
The selected sorter leg can be chosen in the control.
The system shows bag out activity or status for the selected leg if such status is available.
failure_conditions: The bag out control cannot be accessed.
The control does not allow leg selection when this option is expected from the source.
The desired sorter leg cannot be selected.
The bag out action does not start for the selected leg.
The source does not provide detailed validation steps for confirming completion by leg.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the control does not allow leg selection when this option is expected from the source.
Escalate if the selected leg cannot be chosen or the bag out action does not start.
Escalate when confirmation of completion by leg is required, because the source does not provide detailed validation steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall system bag out control content stating that a user can choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: A user could also choose to bag out by leg of the sorter.

missing_details: Exact interface labels for selecting bag out by sorter leg are not provided in the source.
The source does not provide a detailed click path to open the bag out control.
The source does not provide explicit confirmation indicators for successful completion of bag out by leg.
The source does not provide timing expectations for the action.
The source does not specify whether production must be stopped before performing this action.
The source does not specify lockout/tagout requirements.
